name: Company Chicken Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 10.75 oz can cream of chicken soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Variation: Substitute diced cooked turkey for the chicken.
2. Cook noodles according to package directions in boiling water until just tender; drain and rinse thoroughly.
3. In a large bowl, combine remaining ingredients with noodles, making certain the noodles are separated and coated with liquid.
4. Pour mixture into greased Crock-Pot.
5. Cover and cook on Low for 6 to 10 hours or on High for 3 to 4 hours.
6. Serves 6
